about.label: About Us
about.title: Haley's Beauty Therapy
paragraphs: Welcome to Haley's Beauty Therapy — your go-to destination for professional beauty treatments in Chatsworth. We pride ourselves on delivering expert-level care with premium products and a personal touch.
Every client is unique, and we take time to understand what makes you feel beautiful. From the moment you walk in, you'll experience friendly service, attention to detail, and results that last.

testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from happy clients in Durban.

items.quote: Haley's work is absolutely flawless. My gel toes look incredible and lasted for weeks without chipping. The service is so friendly and professional — highly recommended!
I've been getting my gel toes done at Haley's for months now. The designs are creative, the products are clearly premium quality, and the attention to detail is amazing.
Best gel toe experience in Chatsworth. Haley is so skilled and makes you feel completely at ease. My nails have never looked better — will definitely be back!
